assessment: Masked luma-token pretraining ran successfully (loss 0.015299568372561871) and the bounded 320k/5k run finished in 671.2s.
The pretraining branch did not improve the G005 metric bottleneck: keyboard key accuracy, mouse-button accuracy/F1, and semantic button overlap are still zero.
No-button FPR remains low (0.014000411776816966), but that is only a calibration property and not a useful action model.
next_recipe_faithful_actions: The bottleneck is not only unsupervised luma compression; implement action-token sequence/span diffusion for press/release timing instead of single-frame button-class ranking.
Use contiguous temporal action windows and train the IDM to denoise full action spans conditioned on all frames, closer to FDM-1 iterative masked action-token unmasking.
Keep compact video pretraining as optional initialization but do not spend a full-corpus launch on this exact head without a positive prefix signal.
